title: Get asynchronous download task list
content:
Use this endpoint to get `BILLING_REPORT`, `INVOICE_LIST` and `INVOICE_BATCH` tasks. If the tasks have been completed, you can download files via the URL in the response. Both Agency and Direct Business Centers are able to perform invoice related operations. > **Note**
Only users with Finance Manager or Finance Analyst permission can manage payments and invoices in a Business Center. You can use [/bc/member/invite/](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1739939455765505) and [/bc/member/update/](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1739696704424961) to configure or update access settings for members. ## Comparing v1.2 and v1.3 The following table outlines the differences between v1.2 and v1.3 endpoints. ```xtable |Changes{30%}|v1.2{35%}|v1.3{35%}| |---|---|---| |Endpoint path| /v1.2/bc/invoice/task/list/| /v1.3/bc/invoice/task/list/| |Request parameter data type|`bc_id`: number |`bc_id`: string | |Response parameter data type|`bc_id`: number |`bc_id`: string | |Response parameter name|`url` |`download_url` | ``` ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/invoice/task/list/ **Method** GET **Header** ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |Access-Token {Required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738373164380162).| ``` **Parameters** ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |bc_id {Required}|string| Business Center ID. | |page|number| Page number. Default value: 1.| |page_size|number|Page size, in the range of 1-50. Default value: 10.| ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --location --request GET https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/invoice/task/list/?bc_id={{bc_id}} --header 'Access-Token: {{Access-Token}}' (/code) ``` ## Response ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |code |number|Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |message |string|Response message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |request_id |string|The log id of the request, which uniquely identifies a request. | |data |object|Returned data.| #|list|object[]|List of tasks.| ##|bc_id|string|Business Center ID.| ##|task_id|string| Task ID.| ##|status|string|Asynchronous download task status.

Enum values: `FAILED`, `CREATED` (Deprecated), `RUNNING`, `SUCCEED`, `POLLING` (Deprecated).| ##|create_time|string|Created time of the task. | ##|update_time |string|Update time of the task.| ##|download_url|string| If the task has been completed successfully, it will be a url to download the task file. | ##|download_type|string|Download type.

Enum values: `INVOICE_LIST`, `INVOICE_BATCH`.| #|page_info|object| Pagination information.| ##|page|number| Current page number.| ##|page_size| number | Page size.| ##|total_number| number | Total number of results. | ##|total_page| number | Total pages of results.| ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "code": 0, "message": "OK", "request_id": "{{request_id}}", "data": { "list": [ { "bc_id": "{{bc_id}}", "create_time": "{{timestamp}}", "download_type": "INVOICE_BATCH", "download_url": "{{download_url}}", "status": "SUCCEED", "task_id": "{{task_id}}", "update_time": "{{timestamp}}" }, { "bc_id": "{{bc_id}}", "create_time": "{{timestamp}}", "download_type": "INVOICE_BATCH", "download_url": null, "status": "FAILED", "task_id": "{{task_id}}", "update_time": "{{timestamp}}" }, { "bc_id": "{{bc_id}}", "create_time": "{{timestamp}}", "download_type": "BILLING_REPORT", "download_url": "{{download_url}}", "status": "SUCCEED", "task_id": "{{task_id}}", "update_time": "{{timestamp}}" } ], "page_info": { "page": 1, "page_size": 10, "total_number": 11, "total_page": 2 } } } (/code) ```
